projectDescription: A secure culinary subscription platform where chefs publish AES-128-GCM encrypted recipes and subscribers gain time-limited access through cryptographically enforced contracts.
keyFeatures: Hybrid cryptography: ECDSA P-256 identity keys protected with PBKDF2 + AES-128-GCM per user password
Recipe content encrypted with AES-128-GCM via Python PyCryptodome engine
Time-limited subscription contracts (3, 6, or 12 months) enforcing access expiration cryptographically
SHA-256 integrity verification for all stored recipe files in the external vault
Email confirmation via Mailtrap using 32-byte random dynamic tokens
Dual-role system: chefs upload and manage encrypted recipes; subscribers browse and access them
React + Tailwind CSS frontend with role-based dashboards for chefs and subscribers
Node.js/Express backend bridging to Python cryptographic scripts for all sensitive operations
publicApiSurface: POST /api/users/register — Register subscriber with ECDSA key generation
POST /api/users/register-chef — Register chef with ECDSA key generation
POST /api/users/login — Authenticate and decrypt private key in memory
GET /api/users/confirmar/:token — Confirm account via email token
GET /api/chef/dashboard/:id_chef — Get chef stats, recipes, and active subscribers
PUT /api/chef/profile/:id_chef — Update chef profile (description, photo, stars)
POST /api/chef/upload — Upload and AES-128-GCM encrypt a new recipe
GET /api/chef/recipe/decrypt/:id_receta — Decrypt and retrieve a recipe (chef access)
PUT /api/chef/recipe/:id_receta — Re-encrypt and update an existing recipe
DELETE /api/chef/recipe/:id_receta — Delete a recipe and its encrypted vault file
POST /api/subscriber/favorite/toggle — Add or remove a recipe from favorites
POST /api/subscriber/recipe/access — Verify subscription and decrypt recipe for subscriber
